issues.description: Missing condition to check if card was trashed from hand (prerequisite for playing from trash). The effect should only trigger if the cost was paid.
TrashFromHand is a cost, not a triggered action. Should be represented as a condition or cost structure, not as the primary action.
PlaySelf action missing 'rested' property. Card should be played in rested state per card text.
Duration '[Opponent's Turn]' in card text requires duration:"DuringOpponentTurn", not default. This is a mandatory effect timing requirement.
